titleStmt.title: SII 5.603: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 603. (A.R. No. 46 of 1895). ON THE WEST WALL OF THE SAME SHRINE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ḷ po lap perunila
ccelviyun taṉakke
yūrimai pūṇṭa
mai maṉakkoḷak kā
ntaḷūrccālai kalama
ṟuttaruḷi veṅkai
ñāṭuṅ kaṅkapāṭiyūm
taṭikaipāṭiyūm nuḷam
ñāṭu kollamuṅ kaliṅkamum E
ṇṭalamun tiṇṭiṟal veṉṟit taṇṭāṟ koṇṭu tanne
ḻil vaḷaruḻiyuḷ Ellā yāṇṭu n=to ḻutaka viḷaṅkum yā
ṇṭe ceḻiyarait tecukoḷ śrīkovirājarāja rājake
caripanma kku yāṇṭu 10 8 Āvatu vaṭakar[ Ai r] Ājarāja vaḷanāṭṭu
p poykaiñāṭṭut tevatānam tirunettānamuṭaiya pa
tipāta mulattomum pañcācārya rkaḷomum śrīkoyi(l)
luṭaiyomum tevakanmi kaḷomum Ivvūr vaṇṇakka
ṉ muḷḷikkuṟumpiluṭaiyāṉ vaḻakketuṇai kuṇaci
laṉ taraveṇṭu taṉmañceyyap peruvāṉāka nāṅ
kaḷ Iṟaiyili viṟṟukkuṭutta nilam Eṅkaḷ nilanivan=ta m
maruttuvakkuṭi vaṭapulattu Iṟaiccal nilan Araikku
kiḻpāṟ kellaiy perumpuliyūr nilattukku meṟkku
teṉpāṟ kellai kaiyvākkālukku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kel
lai nakkan vaṭṭilāṉ niṉṟaviṭaṅkat talaikkoli paṅku nila
ttukkum tara kan maṇṇaiyāṉa Araṅkat talaikkoliyu
m nilattukku kiḻakkum vaṭṭāṟ kellai kkurai kuṭṭeṟiyāna Ātit
Ivvicaitta perunāṉ kellaiyilum Aka mikuti kkuṟaimai Uḷḷaṭaṅka nilaṉ Arai māvum Ivanukke viṟṟa nilaṉ Oṭaiyil nilaṉ Orumāvaraikku ki
ḻpāṟ kellaiy tevar kaḷḷicce nāṉmāvukku meṟku teṉpāṟ(pāṟ) kellai paṅku Ippaṅku nilattukku (vaṭakku) vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellai O vāykkālukku kiḻakkum
vaṭapāṟ kellai cevveppañce nāṉmāvukku teṟkkum Ivaṉukke viṟṟa nilan Orumāvaraikku kiḻpāṟ kellaiy Irācātittaṉ Ampalattāṭi Āṟu mācceyku meṟkum teṉ
pāṟ kellaiy de van nilan mākāṇikku vaṭakkum melpāṟ kellaiy vaṭakkunokkip poṉa kaiyvāykkālukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai de var Oru māvaraikkut teṟkum Āka muṉṟu
teyp peṟuṭaittumāka Araiye muṉṟu māvum mikutic curukka muḷḷaṭaṅka candrādi ttavaṟ Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟu E
mmi licainta vilaipporuḷ muṟṟuṅ kaiyile Aṟakkoṇṭu tāṉ veṇṭu tanma ñ ceyya viṟṟuk kuṭuttom patipātamum
pañcāryya śrīkoyi(l)luṭaiyomu nde vakarmikaḷomum Innilan Araiye muṉṟumāvum koṇṭu Ivvūr śrīkoyililt tiru
vamirtukku kaṟiyamartukkumāka Oru paṅku mā kkum śrīkoyilluṭaiyom candrāditya vaṟ Aṉu[ bha vip*] patāka nāṅkaḷ koṇṭa kācu muṉṟu kāykkaṟi Amirtu Oṉṟum porikkaṟi Oṉṟukkum yamir tiraṇṭiṉukku nelluk kuṟuṇiyum vāḻaippaḻam Añciṉu
kku nellu nāṉāḻiyum Aṭaikkāyamirtu Irupatum Ilaiyamirtu teri yoruppatu kkum Āka nellu nāṉāḻiyū mākat tiṅkaḷ nellu patakkāka Orāṭṭaikku nellu Irupa Ivvūrc ceṉaiyome candrādi ttavaṟ Ipparicu tiṅkaḷtoṟum Iṭuvatāka koṇṭa poṉ Iru kaḻa
ñcu Ippoṉ ṉirukaḻañcum koṇṭu Iṭuvomāṉom Ivvūrc ceṉaiyom Innilam Araiye muṉṟu māvukkum Iṟaiyum Eccoṟuma veṭṭiyum Āṟaṟukkulaiyum maṟṟum Epperpaṭṭatum kāṭṭappeṟātatāka Ipparicu kallil veṭṭik kuṭuttom pati
pātamulap pañcācāriya śrīkoyiluṭaiyomum de vakarmikaḷomum Itu
panmā heśvara ra
kṣai .
Digital edition of SII 5.603 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
